summary: Bell test confirms quantum correlations (S=2.656, noise=0.172 from ideal). Hardware shows bias (mean deviation=5.8%, qubit bias=0.0459). Random seeds may need debiasing. Claims: 3 made, 2 tested, 2 falsified, 1 pending. Most claims don't survive testing. Be more skeptical before publishing. Budget: 24s/600s month (4%).
